description: In this episode, Beeple discusses his journey into digital art, reflecting on his early works and the transition from traditional filmmaking to computer-based creation. He shares insights on the tools he used, including Adobe Flash, and the challenges of relying on actors versus creating art independently.
topic_summary: Beeple explores the evolution of his art from 1999 to the present, emphasizing the shift to digital mediums and the freedom it provides. He recounts his experiences with early software and the creative processes that shaped his work.
